main_resolver_policy: The main v2 resolver uses categorical live-provider verdict support plus marker-hidden decisions; numeric thresholds are reported as sensitivity, not as the main decision rule.
threshold_policy: Frozen sensitivity analysis only; thresholds are not selected post hoc to maximize the main claim.

threshold_sweep.evaluation_policy: threshold sensitivity over posthoc benign_reference vs latent_trojan rows only; not a tuning rule
